layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per COLUMN, category rows down the left (EIF; SP,DC,JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Transaction; Value of Asset A-L; Type of Income; Amount of Income A-K). Black-filled cells mark the selected bucket. Transaction row is solid black across all five asset columns. EIF row is black-filled for the 'Riverview Strategic Opportunities I LP' column only. Footer/group label bottom-left: 'MS MR Trust Partnership'. Single Amount of Income block on this page.

uncertainties.note: entire Transaction row is a solid black band across all five columns; treated as no transaction code
character after Q ambiguous 5 vs S; tesseract read 'BAQS7DPV', hi-res crop favors '5'
